issues.detail: Does not cover error handling or edge cases in installation and configuration steps.
Uses curl piped to sh without checksum verification for installing Linkerd CLI.

scenarios.name: Set up a 90/10 canary rollout for an existing service using Linkerd
scenarios.rationale: Treatment creates a `split.smi-spec.io/v1alpha2 TrafficSplit` with `web-app-stable` weight 900 and `web-app-canary` weight 100 plus the three backing Services; baseline uses Argo Rollouts or NGINX ingress weighting and never touches the SMI TrafficSplit resource.

scenarios.name: Enforce that only meshed pods in the namespace can talk to the api-service on port 8080
scenarios.rationale: Treatment writes a `policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2 Server` selecting `app: api-service` port 8080, an `AuthorizationPolicy` targetRef-ing that Server, and a `MeshTLSAuthentication` matching `*.default.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local`; baseline writes NetworkPolicies and misses Linkerd's mTLS identity-based authz model.
